Class GeometryEnvironmentClass

ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll
[ClassInterface(ClassInterfaceType.None)]
[Guid("11735DAE-816C-11D0-82F5-0000F8034032")]

AngularAutoDensifyTolerance

The default angular increment to be used with angular densification.

virtual double AngularAutoDensifyTolerance { get; set; }

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

AutoDensifyTolerance

The maximum distance by which on-the-fly deviation-based densification may differ from the original. If the value is less than or equal to zero, the system will try to pick a reasonable tolerance at the time of densification.

virtual double AutoDensifyTolerance { get; set; }

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

double

ConstructZMDomainExtent(double, double, double, out double, out double)

Constructs a low precision Z or M domain extent centered on the specified extent. scale is 1/(desired resolution). If scale is 0.0, a default of 1,000,000.0 is used.

virtual void ConstructZMDomainExtent(double inMin, double inMax, double Scale, out double outMin, out double outMax)

Parameters

inMin double
inMax double
Scale double
outMin double
outMax double

Densify(ISegment, double, ref int, ref ILine[])

pSegment ISegment
maxDeviation double
pcOutSegments int
segments ILine[]

DeviationAutoDensifyTolerance

The default deviation distance to be used for curve segment densification.

virtual double DeviationAutoDensifyTolerance { get; set; }

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

DiceWithTrapezoids

Selects dicing algorithm. True means dicing with trapezoids, False means dicing with smaller polygons and polypolygons. True by default.

virtual bool DiceWithTrapezoids { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

DicingEnabled

Indicates whether large polygons are diced before being sent to GDI. True by default.

virtual bool DicingEnabled { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ExpandSubPixelParts

Selects export to WIN32 shape mode. True means export without loss of sub-pixel parts, False means eliminating parts that degenerate into single pixel. False by default.

virtual bool ExpandSubPixelParts { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

pEdit1 IGeometry
pEdit2 IGeometry

Returns

IGeometry

NoDiceLimit

Polygons with fewer than this number of vertices will not be drawn/printed as a collection of trapezoids.

virtual int NoDiceLimit { get; set; }

Returns

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

PackNormal(IVector3D, out double) 

virtual void PackNormal(IVector3D normalVector, out double packedNormal)

Parameters

normalVector IVector3D
packedNormal double

PackTexture2D(double, double, out double)

Encodes texture coordinates into part of a double. A normal and texture information can both be packed in a single double without conflict.

virtual void PackTexture2D(double textureS, double textureT, out double packedTexture)

Parameters

textureS double
textureT double
packedTexture double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Pre81Compatibility

Indicates if some geometric operations are compatible with releases previous to 8.1. When set to false, return errors for some illegal relational operations (default is true).

virtual bool Pre81Compatibility { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

newSegments ISegment[]

polyCurve IPolycurve2
distances double[]

Returns

IEnumSplitPoint

pSegment ISegment
Offset double
Length double
asRatio bool

packedNormal double
normalVector IVector3D
wasProductive bool

Decodes texture coordinates.

packedTextureST double
textureS double
textureT double

UseAlternativeTopoOps

Indicates whether alternative versions of polygon intersection and union should be used.

virtual bool UseAlternativeTopoOps { get; set; }

Returns

bool
